_comment: Public cloud config, bundled via the asset catalog (Assets.car). Both values are PUBLIC-safe: a publishable Clerk key and a public Convex deployment URL — no secret ships in the app. The Convex deploy key and Clerk SECRET key live only in the gitignored .env. This is NeuroSync's OWN deployment (project neurosync, team inky-team), NOT the landing page's avid-guineapig-274. Empty a value to disable that half of cloud sync.
